S

SceneManager - Class in com.example._0tazo.view
Singleton that manages all scene transitions in the Cincuentazo application.
SceneManager() - Constructor for class com.example._0tazo.view.SceneManager
 
selectCard(int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Highlights the card at the given index as if the mouse hovered over it, removing the highlight from any previously selected card.
selectedCardIndex - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Index of the card currently highlighted via keyboard.
SelectionController - Class in com.example._0tazo.controller
Controller for the machine selection screen (selection-view.fxml).
SelectionController() - Constructor for class com.example._0tazo.controller.SelectionController
 
sessionId - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
 
setBackColor(String) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
 
setFaceUp(boolean) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
 
setHandOpacity(Pane, double) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Sets the opacity of all card nodes inside the given container.
setNumber(String) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
 
setStage(Stage) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.view.SceneManager
Registers the primary stage.
setSuit(String) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
 
setup() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
Prepares the game: deals 4 cards to each player and places the initial card on the table to set the starting sum.
setUp() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.CardTest
 
setUp() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.DeckTest
 
setUp() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.GameTest
 
setupKeyboardShortcuts() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Registers keyboard shortcuts for the human player's turn: 1â€“4 to highlight a card, Enter to play the selected card, T to draw from the deck.
setupLayout(int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Shows only the machine zones needed for this game configuration.
showAceOverlay() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Displays the Ace value selection overlay, allowing the human player to choose between adding 1 or 10 to the table sum.
showMessage(String, boolean) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Displays the message overlay with the given text.
shuffle(Stack<Card>) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Deck
Shuffles the given stack in place.
stage - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.view.SceneManager
The primary stage of the application.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.Main
Configures and displays the primary stage of the application.
startGeneralTimer() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Starts the general game timer, firing ITimerListener.onTick(int) every second until GameTimer.stopAll() or GameTimer.stopGeneralTimer() is called.
startMachineTurnTimer() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Starts the machine turn timer sequence: Waits a random delay between 2 and 4 seconds, then fires ITimerListener.onMachineTurnReady(). Waits a further random delay between 1 and 2 seconds, then fires ITimerListener.onMachineDrawReady().
startTurn() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Starts the current player's turn: checks for automatic elimination, updates the turn indicator, and either enables human interaction or triggers the machine timer.
stopAll() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Stops both timers.
stopGeneralTimer() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Stops the general timer permanently.
stopMachineTurnTimer() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Stops the machine turn timer if it is currently running.
stopped - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
 
suit - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
 
SUITS - Static variable in class com.example._0tazo.model.Deck
The four standard suits of a playing card deck.
SumExceededException(int, int) - Constructor for exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.SumExceededException
Constructs a SumExceededException with context about the card and the current table sum.
sumLabel - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
